parameters.subsql:
SELECT CAST (telegram_id AS bigint),
       COUNT(crm_id) AS leads,
       SUM(qual) AS quals,
       SUM(booking_event) AS bookings
FROM perfomance_all_leads
WHERE telegram_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY telegram_id

parameters.db_version: PostgreSQL 14.13 (Ubuntu 14.13-1.pgdg20.04+1) on x86_64-pc-linux-gnu, compiled by gcc (Ubuntu 9.4.0-1ubuntu1~20.04.2) 9.4.0, 64-bit
